title: Art direction consultation and asset replacement contract
summary: Turn the owner-provided art direction and art-thread consultation into semantic UI tokens, component hierarchy, asset slots and future cut-in replacement rules.
acceptance: Records module sourcing: B layout, C visual mood, A plus C map lamp/path language, B resident list, C plus A inspector and B plus C command bar
Defines semantic design tokens and component slots that can be implemented with CSS/Pixi placeholders now
Defines asset manifest fields for future final art replacement without hardcoding final images into product logic
Separates art advisory decisions from code architecture and keeps all external licensing commitments owner-gated
Records high-cost art work that must not be done in this remediation pass

history.details: Authored post-M8 UI asset replacement contract, WM-0131 plan and report; required checks pass: validate-handoff, taskctl validate, git diff --check, corepack pnpm quality.

verified: No blocking findings. Confirmed B/C/A module sourcing, semantic tokens and slots, manifest and cut-in replacement rules, owner-gated licensing, high-cost art exclusions and downstream guidance; required checks and quality pass.
Integrated verified post-M8 UI asset replacement contract after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.

forbiddenPaths: public release or platform verdict changes

review.summary: No blocking findings. Confirmed B/C/A module sourcing, semantic tokens and slots, manifest and cut-in replacement rules, owner-gated licensing, high-cost art exclusions and downstream guidance; required checks and quality pass.

integration.summary: Integrated verified post-M8 UI asset replacement contract after handoff, taskctl, diff and corepack pnpm quality gates passed.
